name: Chocodiles
recipeInstructions:
Fat grams per serving: Approx.
Cook Time: 15 minutes
Preheat oven to 350°F. In a large bowl, combine all cookie ingredients except flour and salt; blend well. Stir in flour and salt; mix well. Press dough into an ungreased square cake pan. Bake for 15 to 20 minutes until lightly golden brown. Cool slightly.
In a medium saucepan, melt chocolate chips over low heat. Stir in 1/2 cup peanut butter and corn flakes. Spread over slightly cooled base. Cool slightly and cut into bars.
